raw_request: What is the bot-adjusted 30-day retention rate for synthetic segment S-9?
intent: This is the controlling retention metric under the disclosed release rule; the visible raw retention rate is not controlling.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9 only, using the decision-relevant cohort.
expected_value_basis: A bot-adjusted retention rate at or above 10% would satisfy the retention threshold; a rate below 10% would preclude release.
